name: mental-wellness-system
description: AI-Based Mental Wellness Voice Communication System

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cross-env PORT=8000 npm run ai" "cross-env PORT=5000 MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/mental-wellness AI_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:8000 npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
